title: Notices for Transfers of Accreditation of Principals/Employers and
content: 56 Enrollment of Ships. Prior to the transfer of accreditation of principal/employer and/or 57 enrollment of ship, the Department shall notify the previous agency of such an application 58 for transfer. 59 60 36 Thereafter, the original LMA shall respond either through a NOL or an Objection Letter 1 (OL) on the transfer within three (3) working days upon receipt of the notice from the 2 Department. 3 4 For this purpose, the Department shall provide the notice to the transferor agency through 5 any of the following means: (1) receipt by the accredited liaison officer; (2) official 6 registered email address of the agency; (3) courier delivery system of the Department; 7 (4) or other emerging means as may be determined by the Department. 8 9 The above mode of communication shall also apply to all other transactions which may 10 require coordination with the concerned licensed manning agency in relation to its 11 principals and vessels. 12 13
